title: dryopteris irrigua
intro: Dryopteris irrigua, also known as the Northern Wood Fern, is a species of fern that is native to North America and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris irrigua include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
